title: iva annua var. caudata
intro: Iva annua var. caudata is a plant species, also known as marsh elder, that belongs to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally used in folk medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Iva annua var. caudata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Iva annua var. caudata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
